name: Juniper SRX Firewall
description: Juniper SRX Series firewall management via Junos OS REST API for security policies, zones, and traffic monitoring

actions.name: Get Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all security policies configured on the SRX firewall

actions.name: Get Security Zones
actions.description: Retrieve all security zones configured on the firewall

actions.name: Get Address Book
actions.description: Retrieve all address book entries for security policy references

actions.name: Create Address Book Entry
actions.description: Add a new address entry to a security address book (for IP blocking)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Address book entry including name, ip-prefix or dns-name

actions.name: Create Security Policy
actions.description: Create a new security policy rule between zones

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Security policy including from-zone, to-zone, match criteria, and action (permit/deny/reject)

actions.name: Get Interfaces
actions.description: Retrieve all interface configurations and status

actions.name: Get Security Flow Sessions
actions.description: Retrieve active security flow sessions (traffic monitoring)

actions.name: Get Security Log
actions.description: Retrieve security log entries from the firewall

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of log entries to retrieve

actions.name: Commit Configuration
actions.description: Commit pending configuration changes to the device

parameters.name: confirmed
parameters.description: Whether to require confirmation within a timeout period

actions.name: Get System Information
actions.description: Retrieve device system information including model, version, and uptime
